title: CI e2e stabilization

stories.title: **CI-e2e-artifacts** вң… вҖ” `tests/e2e/_shared/artifacts.ts` Playwright fixture that on test failure attaches console log +вҖҰ
stories.summary: **CI-e2e-artifacts** вң… вҖ” `tests/e2e/_shared/artifacts.ts` Playwright fixture that on test failure attaches console log + `__agf.diagnostics()` + `rendererInfo()` + `frameTiming()`. Workflow uploads `playwright-report/` and `test-results/` as artifacts.
verification: legacy import вҖ” see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

stories.title: **CI-e2e-helpers** вң… вҖ” `tests/e2e/_shared/agf.ts` exports `waitForAgfReady(page)` (gates on `__agf` exists вҶ’ `rendererReady` вҶ’ firstвҖҰ
stories.summary: **CI-e2e-helpers** вң… вҖ” `tests/e2e/_shared/agf.ts` exports `waitForAgfReady(page)` (gates on `__agf` exists вҶ’ `rendererReady` вҶ’ first scene-load вҶ’ first frame tick) and `waitForAgfPredicate(page, fn)` (snapshot predicate poll with consistent 30s default). Replaces the historical inline `{ timeout: 5_000 }` pattern.
verification: legacy import вҖ” see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

stories.title: **CI-e2e-preview-mode** вң… вҖ” `playwright.preview.config.ts` runs gameplay + rendering specs against `vite build` + `vite preview` instead ofвҖҰ
stories.summary: **CI-e2e-preview-mode** вң… вҖ” `playwright.preview.config.ts` runs gameplay + rendering specs against `vite build` + `vite preview` instead of the dev server. Avoids per-request TypeScript transform + HMR overhead. New scripts `test:e2e:smoke`, `test:e2e:preview`, `test:e2e:full-dev`.
verification: legacy import вҖ” see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

stories.title: **CI-e2e-required-smoke** вң… вҖ” 14-test smoke project (app, project-switcherГ—3, hello-3d-hierarchyГ—2, dev-bridgeГ—5, playtest-runnerГ—3).
stories.summary: All pass locally in 32s. `preflight` now runs `test:e2e:smoke`, not the full suite.
verification: legacy import вҖ” see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

stories.title: **CI-e2e-full-nightly** вң… вҖ” `.github/workflows/e2e.yml` becomes a smoke-only PR gate.
stories.summary: New `.github/workflows/e2e-nightly.yml` runs the full dev-server matrix + preview-mode matrix on cron (04:00 UTC) + workflow_dispatch + pushes to main.
verification: legacy import вҖ” see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

notes: Verification: `npm run typecheck` вң…; `npm run test:e2e:smoke` вң… вҖ” 14/14 passed in 32s locally.; `npm run test` вң… вҖ” 422 unit tests still pass.

Research: **`docs/research/e2e-ci-investigation.md`** вң… вҖ” Root cause: 5s inline `waitForFunction` budgets calibrated for local macOS frame pacing; ubuntu-latest's SwiftShader software-WebGL + cold Vite transform push the first physics tick past that budget. No production regressions вҖ” every failure is a timeout, never a wrong value.
